issue_summary: FieldComparatorSource.newComparator() doesn't need to throw IOException
code_before:
public abstract FieldComparator<?> newComparator(String fieldname, int numHits, int sortPos, boolean reversed)
      throws IOException;
code_after: public abstract FieldComparator<?> newComparator(String fieldname, int numHits, int sortPos, boolean reversed);
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Creates a comparator for the field in the given index.
   * 
   * @param fieldname
   *          Name of the field to create comparator for.
   * @return FieldComparator.
   * @throws IOException
   *           If an error occurs reading the index.
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Creates a comparator for the field in the given index.
   * 
   * @param fieldname
   *          Name of the field to create comparator for.
   * @return FieldComparator.
   */
